prompt: Create a realistic social-media collage of a young Japanese rookie nurse model in a hospital setting, with a natural candid atmosphere rather than a cosplay look. Use a vertical 3:4 canvas arranged as a clean 4-column by 3-row grid, exactly 12 separate photo panels with thin white gutters between them. Subject: a pretty young Japanese woman in her early 20s with fair skin, large soft eyes, straight dark brown hair with wispy bangs and a low bun. Outfit: a fitted short-sleeve white nurse dress with rounded collar, white nurse cap, name badge, pens in chest pocket, white stockings, and white nurse shoes. Setting: bright Japanese hospital exam rooms and beige clinical corridors, with beds, curtains, IV pole, clipboard, medical cart, stool, fluorescent ceiling lights, wall signs, and neutral cream walls. Lighting should be soft fluorescent hospital light with realistic phone-camera quality, slight wide-angle selfies, natural skin texture, and shallow depth where appropriate. The 12 panels must show exactly these distinct scenes: 1) close-up portrait holding a pink clipboard against her chest, looking gently at camera; 2) hallway rear three-quarter view, turning back over her shoulder; 3) crouching or kneeling beside a bed, leaning toward camera; 4) standing at an IV pole and adjusting an infusion bag; 5) close-up using a stethoscope toward the camera; 6) half-body pose holding a clipboard in an exam room; 7) low-angle rear three-quarter view in the exam room; 8) looking downward at chart or badge with calm expression; 9) full-body rear view walking down a corridor; 10) close-up portrait with pink stethoscope around neck, holding the tubing; 11) full-body standing beside a hospital bed and rolling stool holding a dark clipboard; 12) low seated selfie angle with knees in foreground and the nurse looking softly at camera. Composition should feel like a collection of candid behind-the-scenes hospital photos: varied angles, subtle poses, gentle expressions, clean clinical background, no text overlays, no watermark. Keep the image tasteful, realistic, and professional while emphasizing the natural gesture details: quiet, fresh, rookie nurse, gentle and realistic.
